title: 196 Pieces Self-Adhesive Letter Number Stickers, Sticky Alphabet Sticker with Gems and Rhinestone for Scrapbook, DIY and Crafts Supplies, 4 Sheets Silver
features: Packaging Contents: This set includes 4 sheets of Silver letter Number stickers embellished with rhinestones.
Exquisite: Each letter is adorned with four tiny three-dimensional diamonds, sparkling and shining, extremely delicate.
Ample Quantity: The package contains a total of 196 letter stickers across four sheets, providing sufficient quantity for daily crafting and decorative purposes.
User-Friendly Application: These letter stickers feature a self-adhesive backing, allowing for effortless application on any smooth surface. Simply peel and stick for immediate use.

Versatile Usage: These elegant letter stickers are ideal for a wide range of DIY projects, including personalizing cups, photo frames, greeting cards, invitations, birthday cards, anniversary notes, and more.
description: Product description Shiny diamond letter stickers Quantity: 4 Sheets Color: Silver Material: PVC, GPPS These are small letter stickers with fine glitter on the surface and four small diamonds on each letter. The small letter stickers are suitable for you to decorate your cups, photo frames, laptops, greeting cards, letters, etc. The back of the letters has self-adhesive glue, which you can easily peel off and stick directly to the desired place, very convenient. Safety Warning NO
